approved_command_preview: Run approved repo script chatgpt_staging/exec_scripts/patch_heartbeat_readback_docs_001.ps1. The script inserts short heartbeat/readback pointer sections into chatgpt_staging/README.md, chatgpt_staging/WORKFLOW_REPORTING_POLICY.md, and chatgpt_staging/EXECUTION_LANE.md, commits only those docs plus a docs_patch_result.json readback file, and makes no Airtable, schema, Delete Queue, source-code, skill, or workflow YAML changes.
